done_summary:
## Completed: GitLab (GTLB) Board Presentation Repository

### Deliverables

**16-slide PowerPoint presentation** (`deck/gitlab_board_presentation.pptx`):
1. Title & Recommendation (BUY, $42.00, 95% upside)
2. The Thesis — 5 pillars in the agent's own words
3. What Would Change Our Mind — 3 thesis breakers
4. Financial Trajectory — Revenue & margins chart
5. SaaS Metrics — ARR growth & NRR overlay
6. Competitive Position — Growth vs. valuation scatter
7. Mispricing Thesis — 3 valuation anchors
8. Risk Assessment — Probability vs. impact heat map
9. Bear/Base/Bull — Probability-weighted distribution
10. Reasoning Trail — Dependency graph (data → analysis → conclusion)
11. Dead Ends — 5 rejected approaches, honestly surfaced
12. Confidence & Limitations — Visual spectrum
13. How to Audit This Deck — Self-verification guide
14. Design & Methodology — ADR summary
15. Recommendation & Next Steps — Catalysts, sizing, holding period
16. Q&A / Appendix — Key numbers at a glance

### Repository Structure (42 files)
- `/deck/` — PPTX + build script
- `/assets/charts/` — 7 charts, each with PNG + reproducible Python script
- `/assets/tables/` — 4 CSV data files
- `/audit/traces/` — 5 trace files linking claims to `/input/repo/`
- `/audit/` — numbers.md, quotes.md, reconciliation.md
- `/narrative/` — storyboard.md (committed BEFORE slides), alternatives.md, audience-analysis.md
- `/research/` — 4 dated notes, questions.md, dead-ends.md
- `/decisions/` — ADR-004 (color palette), ADR-005 (chart conventions)
- `README.md`, `sources.md`, `tool-log.md`

### Key Requirements Met
- ✅ Every claim traces to `/input/repo/` via trace files
- ✅ Reasoning trail visualized as dependency graph (Slide 10)
- ✅ Dead ends surfaced honestly (Slide 11)
- ✅ Bear/base/bull as probability-weighted distribution (Slide 9)
- ✅ Self-audit slide (Slide 13)
- ✅ Design choices documented as ADRs
- ✅ Charts reproducible from scripts
- ✅ Quotes preserve context in `/audit/quotes.md`
- ✅ 16 slides (within 15-25 range)
- ✅ Storyboard committed before any slide construction
- ✅ Commit messages explain why, not what
- ✅ Release tag v1.0.0
- ✅ Reproducibility verified (regenerated PPTX and charts)
